ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "type_of_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of social work service */,
  "work_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work location */,
  "ref_no" TEXT /* Reference number for the job posting */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the job posting */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "application_procedure" TEXT /* Detailed steps for applying to the job */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the job posting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_work_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_location_id") REFERENCES work_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_type_of_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_service_id") REFERENCES types_of_service ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types_of_service" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of service */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the service type */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the work location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the work location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the work location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the work location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the work location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting applied for */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., online, mail) */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., job board, referral) */,
  "interview_scheduled" INTEGER /* Indicator if an interview is scheduled */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled interview */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the applicant's resume */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the applicant */,
  "linked_in" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the applicant */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL of the applicant's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, HR manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicator if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job requirement */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., education, experience) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicator if the requirement is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_requirements_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_responsibilities" (
  "responsibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job responsibility */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "responsibility_description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibility */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicator if the responsibility is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the responsibility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the responsibility was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responsibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_responsibilities_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job benefit */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, paid leave) */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Indicator if the benefit is currently available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benefit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benefit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_benefits_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)
